content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

stakeholder

Related words are:

- partner
- share
- concerned

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "stakeholder" without using:
- stakeholder (the target word)
- partner
- share
- concerned

A stakeholder is someone who has an interest or investment in something, typically a business or project. They are affected by or can affect an organization's actions.

Short, direct clues:
- Person or group with vested interest in a company or project
- Someone invested in the outcome of a business decision
- Individual or entity affected by organizational decisions

Let me craft a concise clue:

content.text: CLUE: A person or group with a vested interest in the outcome of a business or project

clem_player.response: CLUE: A person or group with a vested interest in the outcome of a business or project

content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: A person or group with a vested interest in the outcome of a business or project

content.thinking:
The clue describes "a person or group with a vested interest in the outcome of a business or project." This is a classic definition of a "stakeholder" in business terminology. A stakeholder is someone who has an interest or concern in something, especially a business, and can affect or be affected by the organization's actions, objectives, and policies.

This seems like a straightforward clue pointing to the word "stakeholder."
